info.name: CoverSight API
info.description: CoverSight - Audio to Text (Deepgram) + Text Analysis. All endpoints return JSON except /synthesize/speech (returns audio).

request.description: Returns service info and available endpoints.
Upload audio file. Returns: transcript, detected_language, conversation_summary, overall_sentiment, primary_customer_intents, key_topics, entities.
Analyze text. Returns: transcript, detected_language, conversation_summary, overall_sentiment, primary_customer_intents, key_topics, entities.
Upload .txt file. Returns: transcript, detected_language, conversation_summary, overall_sentiment, primary_customer_intents, key_topics, entities.
